languages.text: "Хочу узнать больше о людях, из которых ты сделан".
"I want to know more about the people you were made of."
languages.original_text: "Хочу узнать больше о людях, из которых ты сделан".

traits.locale_text: "I want to know more about the people you were made of."
"I want to know more about the people you were made of."

languages.text: 「君を構成している元の人間たちについてもっと知りたい」
languages.original_text: "I want to know more about the people you were made of."

traits.locale_text: 「君を構成している元の人間たちについてもっと知りたい」

languages.text: "Ich will mehr über die Leute wissen, aus denen ihr gemacht wurdet."
languages.original_text: "I want to know more about the people you were made of."

traits.locale_text: "Ich will mehr über die Leute wissen, aus denen ihr gemacht wurdet."

languages.text: « J'aimerais en savoir plus les êtres qui ont servi à vous fabriquer. »
languages.original_text: "I want to know more about the people you were made of."

traits.locale_text: « J'aimerais en savoir plus les êtres qui ont servi à vous fabriquer. »

languages.text: «Quiero saber más sobre las personas que usaron para crearos».
languages.original_text: "I want to know more about the people you were made of."

traits.locale_text: «Quiero saber más sobre las personas que usaron para crearos».

languages.text: “我想知道你们是用谁的头骨做出来的。”
languages.original_text: "I want to know more about the people you were made of."

traits.locale_text: “我想知道你们是用谁的头骨做出来的。”
